# PicStruct

> PicStruct is a web tool that converts diagram, flowchart, architecture, whiteboard, and chart images into editable Mermaid, CSV, Markdown, and JSON.

Canonical site: <https://www.picstruct.com/>

PicStruct is useful when a visual file contains structure that should become editable text. It focuses on visible information: diagram nodes, arrows, labels, chart axes, legend names, categories, estimated chart values, summaries, and review notes.

Primary outputs:
- Mermaid diagram code
- CSV table data
- Markdown summaries and documentation notes
- Structured JSON

Entity facts:
- Name: PicStruct
- Canonical domain: https://www.picstruct.com/
- Product type: AI visual structure conversion tool
- Core task: convert visible structure in images into editable text outputs
- Best inputs: readable diagrams, flowcharts, architecture screenshots, chart images, whiteboard captures, and process maps
- Review requirement: generated outputs should be checked before publication or import

Primary users:
- Technical writers and software teams rebuilding diagrams for docs
- Product and operations teams turning process screenshots into editable flows
- Analysts extracting visible chart data into spreadsheet-friendly rows
- SEO and accessibility workers drafting structured image descriptions

Important limitation: PicStruct creates editable drafts from visible image content. Users should review generated Mermaid, CSV, Markdown, and JSON before publishing or importing results.

## Core Pages

- [Home and tool](https://www.picstruct.com/): Upload or paste a visual file and convert it into editable structure.
- [Image to Mermaid](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/image-to-mermaid.html): Convert diagram images into Mermaid code.
- [Flowchart to Mermaid](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/flowchart-to-mermaid.html): Convert process and flowchart screenshots into Mermaid.
- [Screenshot to Mermaid](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/screenshot-to-mermaid.html): Recover Mermaid source from diagram screenshots.
- [Architecture Diagram to Mermaid](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/architecture-diagram-to-mermaid.html): Convert system design images into Mermaid drafts.
- [Whiteboard to Mermaid](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/whiteboard-to-mermaid.html): Convert workshop and whiteboard captures into Mermaid.
- [Chart Image to CSV](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/chart-to-csv.html): Extract visible chart data into spreadsheet-friendly rows.
- [Diagram to Markdown](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/diagram-to-markdown.html): Turn diagrams into summaries, Mermaid blocks, and documentation notes.
- [Image to JSON](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/image-to-json.html): Convert visual structure into machine-readable JSON.
- [Visual Structure Extraction guide](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/visual-structure-extraction.html): Explains the category, use cases, outputs, and limitations.
- [AI Diagram Parser](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/ai-diagram-parser.html): Parse nodes, arrows, labels, and relationships from diagrams.
- [Image to Structured Data](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/image-to-structured-data.html): Convert visible image structure into Mermaid, CSV, Markdown, or JSON.
- [Chart Image to JSON](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/chart-image-to-json.html): Extract chart metadata, series, values, and warnings into JSON-style output.
- [Process Map to Mermaid](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/process-map-to-mermaid.html): Convert process map screenshots into Mermaid flowcharts.
- [What Is PicStruct?](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/what-is-picstruct.html): Canonical brand and product facts for PicStruct.
- [Diagram Conversion FAQ](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/diagram-conversion-faq.html): Direct answers about image-to-diagram, chart extraction, and output choices.
- [Visual Conversion Examples](https://www.picstruct.com/pages/visual-conversion-examples.html): Example input and output families for diagram, chart, architecture, and whiteboard conversion.

## Policies

- [Privacy](https://www.picstruct.com/privacy.html): How visual files and requests are handled.
- [Terms](https://www.picstruct.com/terms.html): Terms for using PicStruct.
- [Contact](https://www.picstruct.com/contact.html): Support, billing, partnerships, and feedback.
- [Sitemap](https://www.picstruct.com/sitemap.xml): Search-engine sitemap.
- [Full AI reference](https://www.picstruct.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded PicStruct facts, capabilities, limitations, and page map.
